title: Care shares
description: One exportable, printable care-summary snapshot the care/coordinator compiles from the user's record — labs, medications, insights, and upcoming appointments — to hand to a clinician. Per-user and pod-isolated; there is no public/cross-user share surface. Not medical advice.

title.description: a short label for the export, e.g. 'Summary for cardiology'

scope.description: 'full' | 'labs' | 'meds' | 'summary' — how much of the record the export covers

body.description: the compiled summary in markdown; empty while pending

status.description: 'pending' while the coordinator compiles it, 'ready' when done

token.description: an opaque local id for the printable page (not a public link)
